entries.kun: おぼえる/さめる/さます
entries.notes: Three kun-readings: おぼえる (memorize), さめる (wake up intransitive), さます (wake up transitive).
Primarily used in compounds: 念入り (careful), 記念 (memorial), 残念 (regrettable).
Kun: のこる (to remain, intrans), のこす (to leave behind, trans). On: ざん in 残念(ざんねん, regrettable/unfortunate), 残業(ざんぎょう, overtime).
覚える = commit to memory (learning). Contrast with 思い出す = recall from memory.

entries.meaning: to wake up / to come to one's senses
entries.notes: Intransitive — the subject wakes up on their own. 目が覚める (eyes open / wake up). Contrast with 覚ます (transitive).

entries.meaning: to wake someone up / to bring to one's senses
entries.notes: Transitive — someone wakes another person/thing. 目を覚ます (wake someone up). Contrast with 覚める (intransitive).

entries.meaning: to get used to / to grow accustomed to
entries.notes: Takes に: 日本の生活に慣れる (get used to life in Japan).
忘 (N3.1) + 物 (N4.5). Common at train stations and schools.
忘 (N3.1) + 年 (N5.4) + 会 (N5.17). Lit. forget-year-gathering. A major social tradition in Japanese workplaces and friend groups.
残 (N3.1) + 念 (N3.1). 残念ながら = unfortunately / regrettably. 残念に思う = to feel disappointed. 残念だった = it was a shame.

entries.meaning: to remain / to be left / to survive
entries.notes: Intransitive — something remains on its own: お金が残る = money is left over. 記憶に残る = to stick in one's memory. Contrast with 残す (transitive).

entries.meaning: to leave (something) behind / to save / to preserve
entries.notes: Transitive — you leave something intentionally: 食べ物を残す = to leave food uneaten. 名前を残す = to leave one's name for posterity. Contrast with 残る (intransitive).

entries.meaning: the rest / remainder / what is left
entries.notes: Noun form of 残る. 残りの時間 = the remaining time. 残り物 = leftovers / what's left over. 残り少ない = running low.
残 (N3.1) + 業 (N3.77). 残業する = to work overtime. 残業代 = overtime pay.
習 (N4.32) + 慣 (N3.4). 生活習慣 = lifestyle habits.
自 (N4.11) + 覚 (N3.1). 自覚がある = to be self-aware.
目 (N5.18) + 覚ます (N3.1). Lit. eye-opener. Short for 目覚まし時計.
念 (N3.1) + 入 (N5.5). 念入りに準備する = to prepare carefully.
Kun: つれる (take along), つらなる (line up). On: れん in compounds like 連絡, 連休.
On: たつ in 上達, 達人. Also read たち/だち as a plural/group suffix: 友達, 私たち.
Kun: ちがう (be different/wrong), ちがえる (mistake). On: い in 違反 (violation).
Kun: からむ (get tangled/involved). On: らく in 連絡 (contact).

entries.meaning: to be different / to be wrong
entries.notes: それは違う = that's wrong. 意見が違う = opinions differ. One of the most common verbs in daily conversation.
文化の違い = cultural difference. AとBの違い = the difference between A and B.

entries.meaning: to make a mistake / to mix up
entries.notes: 間 (N5.14) + 違 (N3.2). Transitive: 道を間違えた (took the wrong road). AをBと間違える = to mistake A for B.

entries.meaning: to be wrong / to be mistaken
entries.notes: 間 (N5.14) + 違 (N3.2). Intransitive: 答えが間違っている (the answer is wrong). Often used in ている form to describe a state.
間 (N5.14) + 違 (N3.2). 間違いなく = without a doubt. 間違いがある = there is a mistake.

entries.meaning: to take someone along / to bring someone
entries.notes: 子どもを連れて行く = to take a child along. 連れて来る = to bring someone.
連 (N3.2) + 休 (N5.6). ゴールデンウィークは大型連休 = Golden Week is a major holiday stretch.
連 (N3.2) + 絡 (N3.2). する verb: 連絡する = to contact/get in touch. 連絡先 = contact information.
上 (N5.3) + 達 (N3.2). する verb: 上達する = to improve/get better at. 日本語が上達した = my Japanese has improved.
達 (N3.2) + 人 (N5.1). 料理の達人 = a cooking master.

entries.meaning: to get tangled / to get involved / to pick a fight
entries.notes: 糸が絡む = thread gets tangled. 話に絡む = to get involved in a conversation. Can also mean to pester/accost someone.
Kun: むかし (long ago). On: せき in 昔日 (old days, literary). Almost always read むかし.
On-reading only: さく in 昨日(きのう, irregular), 昨年(さくねん), 昨夜(さくや). 昨日 has the irregular kun-reading きのう.

entries.kun: はじめ/はじめて/はつ/うい
entries.notes: Kun: はじめ (beginning), はじめて (first time), はつ (first~). On: しょ in 初日(しょにち). Not to be confused with 始 (はじめる, to start).
Kun: つぎ (next). On: じ in 次回(じかい), 次第(しだい). Also つぐ = to succeed/follow.

entries.meaning: long ago / in the old days
entries.notes: 昔は〜 = in the old days... 昔の友達 = an old friend (from the past).
昔 (N3.3) + 話 (N5.9). 日本の昔話 = Japanese folk tales. 桃太郎 is a famous 昔話.
昨 (N3.3) + 年 (N5.4). More formal than 去年(きょねん). Common in news and business.
昨 (N3.3) + 夜 (N4.3). Also read ゆうべ in casual speech. 昨夜は寝られなかった = I couldn't sleep last night.
初めて日本に行った = I went to Japan for the first time. Not to be confused with 始めて (starting to do).
初めに = at first / to begin with. 初めから = from the beginning. Contrast: 始め(はじめ) = the start of an action.
初 (N3.3) + 日 (N5.2). 仕事の初日 = first day of work. 映画の初日 = opening day of a movie.
次 (N3.3) + 回 (N4.14). 次回の授業 = the next class. 次回も楽しみにしています = looking forward to next time.
次々と問題が起きた = problems arose one after another. Emphasizes rapid succession.
Kun: つづく (to continue, intrans), つづける (to continue, trans). On: ぞく in 連続(れんぞく, consecutive), 手続き(てつづき, procedure).
On-reading only: よ in 予定(よてい, plan), 予約(よやく, reservation), 予想(よそう, prediction). Always appears in compounds.
Kun: たば (bundle, bunch — 花束 はなたば). On: そく in 約束(やくそく, promise). 束ねる(たばねる) = to bundle/tie together.
On: さい in 〜歳 (age counter — 二十歳 にじゅっさい). Special reading: 二十歳(はたち, 20 years old). Also お歳暮(おせいぼ, year-end gift). Kun: とし (year/age, literary).
Kun: くらす (to live/make a living — 暮らす), くれる (to grow dark/set — 日が暮れる). On: ぼ in お歳暮(おせいぼ). 夕暮れ(ゆうぐれ) = dusk/twilight.
On-reading only: やく. In 約束(やくそく, promise), 約〜(やく, approximately), 予約(よやく, reservation). 予約 now fully writable once both 予(N3.29) and 約(N3.5) are taught — but 予 comes later, so 予約 unlocks at N3.29.
Kun: かれ (he/him — 彼は, also informal 'boyfriend'). かの in 彼女(かのじょ, she/girlfriend). On: ひ in literary compounds. 彼ら(かれら) = they (mixed/male group).
Kun: きみ (you — informal, mainly male speech). On: くん in 〜君(くん) name suffix (used for males, younger people). 君主(くんしゅ) = monarch/ruler.
Kun: むすめ (daughter; young woman). On: じょう in お嬢さん(おじょうさん, young lady/someone's daughter — polite). 一人娘(ひとりむすめ) = only daughter.
On-reading only: そ. In 祖父(そふ, grandfather), 祖母(そぼ, grandmother), 祖先(そせん, ancestor). Never appears alone. 元祖(がんそ) = originator/founder.
Kun: だれ (who). Polite/literary variant: どなた. 誰か(だれか) = someone. 誰でも(だれでも) = anyone/everyone. 誰も(だれも) + negative = nobody. たれ is literary/archaic.
On: ぜん in 全部(ぜんぶ, all), 全体(ぜんたい, whole), 全国(ぜんこく, nationwide), 全員(ぜんいん, all members), 全力(ぜんりょく, full effort). Kun: すべて (all/everything), まったく (completely/utterly).
On: ぶ in 全部(ぜんぶ, all), 部分(ぶぶん, part), 一部(いちぶ, a portion), 内部(ないぶ, interior), 部屋(へや, room — irregular reading). Also used for school clubs: 野球部(やきゅうぶ, baseball club).
On: ない in 内部(ないぶ, interior), 国内(こくない, domestic), 以内(いない, within). Kun: うち (inside/home — often kept in hiragana in casual use). 内側(うちがわ) = inner side.
Kun: がわ as suffix — 右側(みぎがわ, right side), 左側(ひだりがわ, left side), 内側(うちがわ, inner side), 外側(そとがわ, outer side). On: そく in formal compounds. 両側(りょうがわ) = both sides (両 not in curriculum).
Kun: かならず (certainly, without fail — 必ず). On: ひつ in 必要(ひつよう, necessary), 必死(ひっし, desperate), 必勝(ひっしょう — 勝 not in curriculum). Always implies inevitability or obligation.
On: よう in 必要(ひつよう, necessary), 重要(じゅうよう, important), 主要(しゅよう, main). Kun: いる (to need — 要る), かなめ (keystone, crux — 要の人物). 要求(ようきゅう, demand) unlocks at N3.25 when 求 is taught.
On-reading only: か. In 可能(かのう, possible — unlocks N3.23 when 能 is taught), 不可(ふか, not permitted). Also used as a grade: 可 = passing/acceptable (below 良). 許可(きょか, permission — 許 not in curriculum).
Kun: かぎる (to limit — 限る), かぎり (limit, as far as — 限り). On: げん in 限界(げんかい, boundary/limit), 限定(げんてい, limited — unlocks N3.29 when 定 is taught), 制限(せいげん — 制 not in curriculum until N3.56).
Most common in 一緒(いっしょ, together). On: しょ in 一緒. Rare kun: お (cord/string). Not commonly used alone.
On: まつ in 週末(しゅうまつ, weekend), 月末(げつまつ, end of month), 年末(ねんまつ, year-end). Kun: すえ (the end/future — 末っ子 = youngest child).
Transitive — you continue something: 勉強を続ける = to continue studying. Often follows te-form: 走り続ける = to keep running.

entries.meaning: to continue / to last / to follow
entries.notes: Intransitive — something continues on its own: 雨が続く = the rain continues. 道が続く = the road goes on. Pair with 続ける (transitive).
手 (N5.1) + 続 (N3.4). 入学の手続き = enrollment procedure. 手続きをする = to complete paperwork/formalities.
予 (N3.29) + 定 (N3.29). Both kanji unlock together at N3.29. 予定がある = to have plans. 予定を立てる = to make plans. 〜する予定です = planning to do ~.
予 (N3.29) + 約 (N3.5). 約 is taught earlier; both available at N3.29. 予約する = to make a reservation. ホテルの予約 = hotel reservation.
約 (N3.5) + 束 (N3.5). 約束する = to promise. 約束を守る = to keep a promise. 約束を破る = to break a promise.
花 (N4.7) + 束 (N3.5). 花束をもらう = to receive a bouquet. A common gift for ceremonies and celebrations.
束 (N3.5). 一束(ひとたば, one bundle). 束にする = to bundle. Used for flowers, documents, cash, etc.

entries.meaning: to bundle / to tie together / to bind
entries.notes: 束 (N3.5). 束ねる = to tie into a bundle. 髪を束ねる = to tie up one's hair. Also metaphorical: 部下を束ねる = to manage subordinates.

entries.meaning: to live / to get by / to make a living
entries.notes: 暮 (N3.5). 日本で暮らす = to live in Japan. 一人で暮らす = to live alone. Focuses on daily life/livelihood rather than mere existence (住む).
暮 (N3.5). Noun form of 暮らす. 暮らしが楽になる = life becomes easier. 田舎の暮らし = rural life.
夕 (N4.3) + 暮 (N3.5). 夕暮れ時(ゆうぐれどき) = dusk, the twilight hour. Literary/poetic nuance compared to 夕方(ゆうがた).
歳 (N3.5) + 暮 (N3.5). One of Japan's two major gift-giving seasons (summer: お中元; winter: お歳暮). Typically given in December to those who have helped you during the year.
約 (N3.5). Prefix/adverb used before numbers: 約100人(やく100にん, approximately 100 people). More formal than だいたい or ごろ.
歳 (N3.5). Counter for age: 二十歳(にじゅっさい, 20 years old). Special: 二十歳(はたち, 20 years old) is an irregular reading. 何歳(なんさい) = how old? See also: v_hatachi.
彼 (N3.6). Third-person pronoun for males. In modern casual speech also means 'boyfriend': 彼ができた = I got a boyfriend. 彼ら(かれら) = they (male/mixed group).
彼 (N3.6) + 女 (N5.1). Third-person pronoun for females. Also commonly means 'girlfriend': 彼女がいる = to have a girlfriend. 彼女たち = they (female group).
君 (N3.6). Informal second-person pronoun, used mainly by males toward peers or juniors. More intimate than あなた but can sound condescending in some contexts. Common in song lyrics and literature.
娘 (N3.6). Own daughter (humble/plain): うちの娘 = my daughter. Also used generally for 'young woman'. 一人娘(ひとりむすめ) = only daughter. Contrast: 息子(むすこ, son).
祖 (N3.6) + 父 (N5.1). Formal/humble term for one's own grandfather. Use おじいさん when referring to someone else's grandfather or speaking informally. 祖父母(そふぼ) = grandparents.
祖 (N3.6) + 母 (N5.1). Formal/humble term for one's own grandmother. Use おばあさん when referring to someone else's grandmother or speaking informally. 祖父母(そふぼ) = grandparents.
祖 (N3.6) + 先 (N5.1). 祖先を敬う = to respect one's ancestors. お盆 is the Buddhist festival for honoring 祖先. Contrast: 子孫(しそん, descendant).

Pure kana. Informal/spoken term for grandfather or an elderly man in general. Use 祖父(そふ) when speaking humbly about your own grandfather. Double い: おじいさん (grandfather) vs おじさん (uncle/middle-aged man).

Pure kana. Informal/spoken term for grandmother or an elderly woman in general. Use 祖母(そぼ) when speaking humbly about your own grandmother. Double あ: おばあさん (grandmother) vs おばさん (aunt/middle-aged woman).
祖 (N3.6) + 父 (N5.1) + 母 (N5.1). Collective term for both grandparents. 祖父母の家 = grandparents' house. Contrast individual terms: 祖父(そふ) and 祖母(そぼ).
全 (N3.7) + 部 (N3.7). 全部で = in total. 全部食べた = ate everything. More colloquial than 全て(すべて). Often used as an adverb: 全部わかった = I understood everything.
全 (N3.7). Kun-reading of 全. More formal/literary than 全部(ぜんぶ). 全ての人 = all people. 全てにおいて = in every respect. Often written in hiragana: すべて.
全 (N3.7) + 国 (N5.9). 全国大会(ぜんこくたいかい) = national competition. 全国的に(ぜんこくてきに) = nationwide. Often used as a modifier: 全国ネット = national network.
全 (N3.7) + 体 (N4.12). 全体的に = overall / on the whole. 全体像(ぜんたいぞう) = the big picture. 全体会議 = plenary meeting. Contrasts with 部分(ぶぶん, part).
全 (N3.7) + 員 (N4.14). 全員集合 = everyone assemble. 全員参加 = full participation. Refers specifically to all members of a defined group, not 'everyone' in general (みんな).

entries.meaning: full effort / with all one's strength
entries.notes: 全 (N3.7) + 力 (N4.18). 全力を尽くす = to do one's utmost. 全力で走る = to run with all one's might. 全力投球(ぜんりょくとうきゅう) = giving it everything (lit. full-power pitch).
部 (N3.7) + 分 (N5.5). 一部分(いちぶぶん) = one part. この部分が難しい = this part is difficult. Contrast: 全体(ぜんたい, whole) and 一部(いちぶ, a portion).
一 (N5.1) + 部 (N3.7). 一部の人 = some people / a portion of people. 一部始終(いちぶしじゅう) = the whole story from start to finish. Also means 'one copy' (of a document): 一部ください = one copy please.
部 (N3.7) + 屋 (N4.20). Irregular reading: へや (not ぶや). 自分の部屋 = one's own room. 部屋を片付ける = to tidy up a room. 一人部屋 = single room.
内 (N3.7) + 部 (N3.7). 内部情報(ないぶじょうほう) = inside information. 内部告発(ないぶこくはつ) = whistleblowing. More formal/structural than 中(なか) for describing interiors of organisations or structures.
国 (N5.9) + 内 (N3.7). 国内旅行 = domestic travel. 国内外(こくないがい) = at home and abroad. Contrast: 海外(かいがい, overseas/foreign).
以 (N4.29) + 内 (N3.7). Used after a quantity/time: 一週間以内に = within one week. 予算以内 = within budget. Contrast: 以上(いじょう, more than/above) and 以下(いか, less than/below).
内 (N3.7) + 側 (N3.7). 内側から鍵をかける = to lock from the inside. 袋の内側 = the inside of the bag. Contrast: 外側(そとがわ, outer side).
右 (N5.16) + 側 (N3.7). 右側を歩いてください = please walk on the right side. 道の右側 = the right side of the road. Contrast: 左側(ひだりがわ).
左 (N5.16) + 側 (N3.7). 左側通行(ひだりがわつうこう) = keep left (traffic rule). 左側の棚 = the shelf on the left side. Contrast: 右側(みぎがわ).
外 (N5.9) + 側 (N3.7). 建物の外側 = the outside of the building. 外側から見る = to look from the outside. Contrast: 内側(うちがわ, inner side).
必 (N3.8). 必ず来てください = please be sure to come. 必ずしも～ない = not necessarily. Stronger than きっと (probably) — implies near-certainty or obligation.
必 (N3.8) + 要 (N3.8). 必要がある = there is a need to. 必要以上に = more than necessary. 必要性(ひつようせい, necessity — 性 not in curriculum). Used both as na-adj (必要な書類) and noun (必要はない).

entries.meaning: desperate / frantic / with all one's might
entries.notes: 必 (N3.8) + 死 (N4.15). Lit. 'certain death' → desperate/frantic effort. 必死に勉強する = to study frantically. 必死の形相 = desperate expression. Often used adverbially: 必死になって = desperately.
重 (N4.23) + 要 (N3.8). 重要な問題 = an important issue. 重要視する = to regard as important. More formal/serious than 大事(だいじ) or 大切(たいせつ). Common in official, academic, and business contexts.
主 (N4.35) + 要 (N3.8). 主要な原因 = the main cause. 主要国 = major nations. More formal than メイン or 主な(おもな). Often used in analytical or journalistic writing.

要 (N3.8). Godan verb (ending in る — irregular godan). お金が要る = money is needed. 要らない = not needed/unnecessary. Distinct from 居る(いる, to exist/be — ichidan). In casual speech often written in hiragana: いる/いらない.
不 (N4.36) + 要 (N3.8). 不要な物を捨てる = to throw away unnecessary things. 不要不急(ふようふきゅう) = non-essential and non-urgent. Formal/written register; in speech, いらない is more common.
不 (N4.36) + 可 (N3.8). 入場不可 = entry not permitted. 不可欠(ふかけつ, indispensable — 欠 N3.25). Also used as a grade: 不可 = fail/unacceptable. Contrast: 可(か, passing) and 不可能(ふかのう, impossible — unlocks N3.23).

entries.meaning: to limit / to restrict / to be limited to
entries.notes: 限 (N3.8). 参加者を10人に限る = to limit participants to 10. ～とは限らない = it is not necessarily the case that~. ～に限らず = not limited to~. Key grammar pattern for expressing limitations and exceptions.

entries.meaning: limit / as far as / as long as
entries.notes: 限 (N3.8). Noun form of 限る. 力の限り = to the best of one's ability. ～する限り = as long as one does~. 今日限り = as of today (final). 限りなく = limitlessly. Key grammar item for N3 grammar patterns.

entries.meaning: limit / boundary / the end of one's rope
entries.notes: 限 (N3.8) + 界 (N4.11). 限界に達する = to reach one's limit. もう限界だ = I've hit my limit. 限界を超える = to exceed the limit. 可能性の限界 = the limits of possibility.
月 (N5.2) + 末 (N3.4). 月末に払う = to pay at end of month. Contrast with 月初め(つきはじめ, beginning of month).
年 (N5.4) + 末 (N3.4). 年末年始 = year-end and New Year holidays. 年末に = at year-end.
連 (N3.2) + 続 (N3.4). 連続ドラマ = serial drama. 三日連続 = three days in a row. 連続する = to be continuous.
Compounds at N3.9: 命(いのち, life), 運命(うんめい, fate), 使命(しめい, mission), 生命(せいめい, life-formal). Deferred: 命令(めいれい, order) — 令 not in curriculum.
Compounds at N3.9: 死亡(しぼう, death), 亡くなる(なくなる, to pass away), 亡命(ぼうめい, exile).
Compounds at N3.9: 危険(きけん, danger), 危ない(あぶない, dangerous), 危機(きき, crisis). Deferred: 危害(きがい, harm) — 害 N3.13.
Compounds at N3.9: 危険(きけん, danger), 険しい(けわしい, steep/harsh). Deferred: 冒険(ぼうけん, adventure) — 冒 not in curriculum; 保険(ほけん, insurance) — 保 N3.47.
命 (N3.9). The individual's life force or soul. 命がけ = risking one's life. 命を救う = to save a life. 命令(めいれい, order/command) uses the めい reading — 令 not in curriculum.
運 (N4.16) + 命 (N3.9). 運命的な出会い = fateful encounter. 運命を受け入れる = to accept one's fate.
使 (N4.14) + 命 (N3.9). 使命感 = sense of mission. 使命を果たす = to fulfill one's mission.
生 (N5.7) + 命 (N3.9). More formal/scientific than 命(いのち). 生命保険 = life insurance (保険 available N3.47). 地球上の生命 = life on Earth.
死 (N4.15) + 亡 (N3.9). Used in news, medical, and legal contexts. 死亡する = to die. 死亡率 = mortality rate. In everyday speech, prefer 亡くなる or 死ぬ.

亡 (N3.9). The respectful way to say someone has died — used when referring to others. 祖父が亡くなりました = My grandfather passed away. Do not use of oneself. Contrast with 死ぬ (plain) and 死亡する (formal/official).
亡 (N3.9) + 命 (N3.9). Both kanji unlock at N3.9. 亡命する = to defect/flee into exile. 亡命者 = political exile/defector. 亡命を求める = to seek asylum.
危 (N3.9) + 険 (N3.9). Both kanji unlock at N3.9. 危険な場所 = dangerous place (な-adj use). 危険を冒す = to take a risk. 危険性 = dangerousness. Also functions as な-adjective: 危険だ / 危険な。
危 (N3.9). い-adjective. Colloquial/everyday danger. 危ない！= Watch out! 危ない道 = dangerous road. あぶなかった！= That was close! More casual than 危険な; often used as a warning exclamation.
危 (N3.9) + 機 (N4.25). 危機に陥る = to fall into crisis. 危機感 = sense of crisis. 経済危機 = economic crisis. 危機を乗り越える = to overcome a crisis.
険 (N3.9). い-adjective. 険しい山道 = steep mountain path. 険しい表情 = stern/grim expression. 険しい状況 = harsh/severe situation. Describes both physical terrain (steep) and emotional/situational severity (grim).
Compounds at N3.10: 方法(ほうほう, method), 文法(ぶんぽう, grammar), 合法(ごうほう, legal), 違法(いほう, illegal). Deferred: 法律(ほうりつ, law) — 律 not in curriculum; 憲法(けんぽう, constitution) — 憲 not in curriculum.
Compounds at N3.10: 戦う(たたかう, to fight), 作戦(さくせん, strategy), 戦後(せんご, post-war), 内戦(ないせん, civil war). Deferred: 戦争(せんそう, war) — 争 N3.45; 決戦(けっせん, decisive battle) — 決 N3.29.

Compounds at N3.10: 選ぶ(えらぶ, to choose), 選手(せんしゅ, athlete/player), 当選(とうせん, being elected/winning), 選考(せんこう, selection/screening). Deferred: 選挙(せんきょ, election) — 挙 not in curriculum; 選択(せんたく, choice) — 択 not in curriculum; 落選(らくせん, losing election) — 落 N3.38.
Compounds at N3.10: 参考(さんこう, reference), お参り(おまいり, shrine/temple visit). Deferred: 参加(さんか, participation) — 加 N3.17; 参拝(さんぱい, formal shrine visit) — 拝 not in curriculum.
方 (N5.3) + 法 (N3.10). 方法を考える = to think of a method. 解決方法 = solution method. 方法がない = there is no way. 勉強の方法 = study method.
文 (N4.5) + 法 (N3.10). 文法を勉強する = to study grammar. 英語の文法 = English grammar. Note: ぽう is rendaku of ほう.
合 (N4.6) + 法 (N3.10). 合法的 = legal (adjectival form). 合法的な方法 = legal method. Contrast with 違法(いほう, illegal). 合法化する = to legalize.
違 (N3.2) + 法 (N3.10). 違法行為 = illegal act. 違法な方法 = unlawful method. 違法だ = it is illegal. Contrast with 合法(ごうほう, legal).

entries.meaning: to fight / to battle / to compete
entries.notes: 戦 (N3.10). Godan verb ending in う. Used for physical combat, competitive matches, and figurative struggle. 困難と戦う = to fight against difficulty. 試合で戦う = to compete in a match. 戦い = battle/fight (noun form).
作 (N4.3) + 戦 (N3.10). 作戦を立てる = to draw up a strategy. 作戦会議 = strategy meeting. 作戦通りに行く = to go according to plan. Used in military, sports, and game contexts.
内 (N3.7) + 戦 (N3.10). 内戦が起きる = civil war breaks out. 内戦中 = during the civil war. 内戦の歴史 = history of civil war. Refers specifically to war within a country.
戦 (N3.10) + 後 (N5.9). Both kanji available at N3.10. 戦後の日本 = post-war Japan. 戦後社会 = post-war society. Often refers specifically to post-World War II in Japanese context.

entries.meaning: to choose / to select / to elect
entries.notes: 選 (N3.10). Godan verb ending in ぶ. 自分で選ぶ = to choose for oneself. 代表を選ぶ = to elect a representative. 方法を選ぶ = to choose a method. 選ばれる (passive) = to be chosen/selected.
選 (N3.10) + 手 (N5.3). オリンピック選手 = Olympic athlete. 選手を選ぶ = to select players. サッカー選手 = soccer player. Note: distinct from v_senshuu (先週, last week).

entries.meaning: winning an election / being selected / being drawn (lottery)
entries.notes: 当 (N4.23) + 選 (N3.10). 当選する = to win an election / to be selected. 当選者 = winner / elected person. 宝くじに当選する = to win the lottery.
参 (N3.10) + 考 (N4.7). 参考にする = to use as a reference. 参考書(さんこうしょ) = reference book (書 N5.11). 参考になる = to be useful/helpful as a reference.
Kun: まもる (to protect — 守る), もり (guard, keeper — 留守番 るすばん). On: しゅ in 守備(しゅび, defense), す in 留守(るす, absence — 留 N3.58). お守り(おまもり) = protective charm/amulet.
Kun: ぬすむ (to steal — 盗む). On: とう in 強盗(ごうとう, robbery — 強 N4.18), 盗難(とうなん, theft — 難 N3.82), 盗賊(とうぞく, thief/bandit).
Kun: ころす (to kill — 殺す). On: さつ in 殺人(さつじん, murder), 自殺(じさつ, suicide — 自 N4.4), 殺害(さつがい, killing — 害 N3.13 next). Also figurative: 時間を殺す = to kill time.
On: はん in 犯人(はんにん, criminal/culprit), 犯罪(はんざい, crime — 罪 N3.55), 防犯(ぼうはん, crime prevention — 防 not in curriculum). Kun: おかす (to commit, violate — 犯す).

entries.meaning: to protect / to defend / to keep (a promise, rule)
entries.notes: 守 (N3.11). 家族を守る = to protect one's family. 約束を守る = to keep a promise (約束 N3.5). ルールを守る = to obey rules. Transitive.
守 (N3.11). Noun form of 守る. 守りが固い = the defense is solid. Contrast with 攻め (offense, 攻 not taught).

entries.meaning: protective charm / amulet (from a shrine or temple)
entries.notes: お (honorific prefix) + 守 (N3.11). Traditional Japanese good-luck charms sold at shrines. 交通安全のお守り = traffic-safety charm.
盗 (N3.11). お金を盗む = to steal money. 心を盗む = to steal someone's heart (figurative). Transitive.
強 (N4.18) + 盗 (N3.11). 強盗事件 = robbery incident. 銀行強盗 = bank robbery. Refers to both the crime and the criminal.
殺 (N3.11). 時間を殺す = to kill time. 声を殺す = to lower one's voice (lit. kill the voice). Transitive.
殺 (N3.11) + 人 (N5.1). 殺人事件 = murder case. 殺人犯 = murderer (using 犯 N3.11).
自 (N4.4) + 殺 (N3.11). 自殺する = to commit suicide. Sensitive topic — handle carefully in content.
犯 (N3.11) + 人 (N5.1). 犯人を捕まえる = to catch the criminal (捕 N3.47). The person who committed a specific crime (vs. 犯罪者 a criminal in general).
犯 (N3.11). 罪を犯す = to commit a crime (罪 N3.55, write in kana until then). ミスを犯す = to make a mistake. Transitive, formal.
犯 (N3.11) + 罪 (N3.55). Write as 犯ざい until N3.55. 犯罪を犯す = to commit a crime. 犯罪者 = criminal (者 N4). 犯罪率 = crime rate.

entries.meaning: to watch over / to keep an eye on / to guard
entries.notes: 見 (N5.14) + 守 (N3.11). 子供を見守る = to watch over children. 成長を見守る = to watch someone's growth. Warm/protective nuance vs just 見る.
犯 (N3.11) + 行 (N5.6). 犯行現場 = crime scene (現 N3.35). 犯行時間 = time of the crime. News/legal register.
盗 (N3.11). Noun form of 盗む. 盗みを働く = to commit theft (働 N4.1). 盗み聞き = eavesdropping.
殺 (N3.11) + 人 (N5.1) + 犯 (N3.11). 殺人犯を捕まえる = to catch the murderer. Compound of 殺人 + 犯. News register.
Kun: かつ (to win — 勝つ), まさる (to surpass — 勝る). On: しょう in 優勝(ゆうしょう, championship — 優 N3.22), 勝利(しょうり, victory — 利 N3.41). 勝負(しょうぶ, match — 負 N3.13 next). 勝手(かって, selfish/as one pleases — 手 N5.1).
Kun: つとめる (to strive — 努める — distinct from 勤める 'work at' 勤 N3.77 and 務める 'serve as' 務 N3.77). On: ど in 努力(どりょく, effort). 努めて = as much as possible / diligently.

Kun: なる (to become/come to be — 成る, more formal than なる), なす (to achieve — 成す). On: せい in 成長(せいちょう, growth), 成人(せいじん, adult), 完成(かんせい, completion — 完 N3.17), 達成(たっせい, achievement — 達 N3.2). じょう in 成仏(じょうぶつ, not taught).
Kun: える/うる (to gain — 得る, ichidan, both えru and うru dictionary forms). On: とく in 得意(とくい, good at), 所得(しょとく, income — 所 N4.9), 納得(なっとく, consent — 納 not taught), 損得(そんとく, profit and loss).

entries.meaning: to win / to beat / to prevail
entries.notes: 勝 (N3.12). 試合に勝つ = to win a match (試合 N4). 〜に勝つ (particle に marks the opponent). Intransitive.
勝 (N3.12). Noun form of 勝つ. 勝ちを収める = to achieve a win. Antonym: 負け (N3.13).

entries.meaning: selfish / arbitrary / as one pleases / convenience
entries.notes: 勝 (N3.12) + 手 (N5.1). 勝手なことを言う = to say selfish things. 勝手に = without permission / arbitrarily. Also noun: kitchen (archaic).

entries.meaning: to strive / to make an effort / to endeavor
entries.notes: 努 (N3.12). 改善に努める = to strive to improve. Distinct from 勤める (work at a company, 勤 N3.77) and 務める (serve as a role, 務 N3.77).
努 (N3.12) + 力 (N5.16). 努力する = to make an effort. 努力家 = hardworking person. Often combined with に for direction: 成功に向けて努力する.

entries.meaning: to become / to be completed / to consist of (formal)
entries.notes: 成 (N3.12). Formal/written variant of なる (v_naru, N5). AはBから成る = A consists of B. Usually written in kana in casual text; kanji form is literary/formal.
成 (N3.12) + 長 (N4.12). 成長する = to grow. 子供の成長 = a child's growth. Also figurative: economic or personal growth.
成 (N3.12) + 人 (N5.1). 成人式 = coming-of-age ceremony (式 N3.60). 成人の日 = Coming of Age Day (second Monday of January).
達 (N3.2) + 成 (N3.12). 達成する = to achieve. 目標を達成する = to achieve a goal (目標 uses 目 N5 + 標 not taught).

entries.meaning: to gain / to obtain / to acquire
entries.notes: 得 (N3.12). Also read うる in literary/auxiliary usage (〜し得る = can do). 知識を得る = to gain knowledge (知識 N3.53). 経験を得る = to gain experience (経験 N3.73).

entries.meaning: good at / one's strong point / pride
entries.notes: 得 (N3.12) + 意 (N4.7). 数学が得意です = I'm good at math. Antonym: 苦手 (にがて, N3.34). Also noun: 得意先 = regular customer (in business).
所 (N4.9) + 得 (N3.12). 所得税 = income tax (税 not taught). 年間所得 = annual income. More formal than 収入 (しゅうにゅう, N3.41).
説 (N4.19) + 得 (N3.12). 説得する = to persuade. 説得力がある = to be persuasive (lit. have persuasion power). 親を説得する = to persuade one's parents.
必 (N3.8) + 勝 (N3.12). 必勝法 = surefire winning strategy. 必勝祈願 = prayer for certain victory. Common in sports, gaming, and exams.
勝 (N3.12) + 者 (N4.25). 勝者と敗者 = winner and loser (敗 N3.13). Formal register. Antonym: 敗者.
心 (N4.7) + 得 (N3.12). 心得がある = to have experience/know-how. 心得違い = misunderstanding of proper conduct. Also verb: 心得る (to understand, to be familiar with).
生 (N5.1) + 成 (N3.12). 生成する = to generate/create. AI画像生成 = AI image generation. Also natural: 雲の生成 = cloud formation.
努 (N3.12) + 力 (N5.16) + 家 (N5.8). 彼は努力家だ = He's a hard worker. The ～家 suffix indicates a person characterized by the preceding trait.
Kun: うしなう (to lose — 失う). On: しつ in 失敗(しっぱい, failure), 失礼(しつれい, rudeness — 礼 N3.54), 失望(しつぼう, disappointment — 望 N3.33), 紛失(ふんしつ — 紛 not taught). Contrast: 負ける (be defeated) vs 失う (lose possession).
Kun: やぶれる (to be defeated — 敗れる, not to be confused with 破れる 'to tear' — 破 N3.15). On: はい in 失敗(しっぱい, failure), 勝敗(しょうはい, victory or defeat — 勝 N3.12), 敗北(はいぼく, defeat — 北 N5.7).

Kun: まける (to lose, be defeated — 負ける, ichidan), おう (to carry on one's back, to bear — 負う, godan). On: ふ in 勝負(しょうぶ, match/contest — 勝 N3.12), 負担(ふたん, burden — 担 not taught), 負傷(ふしょう, injury — 傷 not taught).
On-reading only. 殺害(さつがい, killing — 殺 N3.11), 被害(ひがい, damage — 被 not taught, write ひ害), 害虫(がいちゅう, pest — 虫 not taught), 公害(こうがい, pollution — 公 N3.56), 害する (to harm). No common kun.
失 (N3.13). 命を失う = to lose one's life (命 N3.9). 自信を失う = to lose confidence (自信 uses 信 N3.43). Transitive. Distinct from 負ける (to be defeated in a contest).
失 (N3.13) + 敗 (N3.13). 失敗する = to fail, to make a mistake. 失敗作 = a failed work/effort. Antonym: 成功 (せいこう — 功 not in curriculum, use in kana if needed).
失 (N3.13) + 礼 (N3.54). Write as 失れい until N3.54. 失礼します = Excuse me (entering/leaving a room). 失礼な人 = a rude person. Essential polite expression.
負 (N3.13). 試合に負ける = to lose a match. 〜に負ける (に marks the opponent). Antonym: 勝つ (N3.12). Also figurative: 誘惑に負ける = to give in to temptation.
負 (N3.13). Noun form of 負ける. 負けを認める = to admit defeat (認 N3.50). Antonym: 勝ち (N3.12).

entries.meaning: to bear / to carry on one's back / to owe / to be responsible for
entries.notes: 負 (N3.13). 責任を負う = to bear responsibility (責任 N3.74). 借金を負う = to owe a debt (借金 N4). Formal/written; rarely used in casual speech.
勝 (N3.12) + 負 (N3.13). 勝負する = to have a match / to compete. 真剣勝負 = a serious contest. 勝負がつく = a match is decided.

entries.meaning: victory or defeat / the outcome of a contest
entries.notes: 勝 (N3.12) + 敗 (N3.13). 勝敗を決める = to decide the outcome. More formal than 勝負, focuses on win/loss outcome.
敗 (N3.13) + 北 (N5.7). 敗北する = to be defeated. Formal/written register. Antonym: 勝利 (しょうり, 勝 N3.12 + 利 N3.41).

entries.meaning: to harm / to injure / to damage
entries.notes: 害 (N3.13). 健康を害する = to damage one's health (健康 N4). 気分を害する = to hurt someone's feelings. Formal; for casual, use 傷つける.
殺 (N3.11) + 害 (N3.13). 殺害する = to kill/murder. More formal than 殺す; news/legal register.

entries.meaning: to lose sight of / to lose track of
entries.notes: 見 (N5.14) + 失 (N3.13). 犯人を見失う = to lose sight of the criminal. 目標を見失う = to lose sight of one's goal (figurative). Compound verb: 見 + 失う.
有 (N4.26) + 害 (N3.13). 有害物質 = harmful substance. 健康に有害だ = harmful to health. Antonym: 無害 (むがい — 無 N3.57).

entries.meaning: slip of the tongue / verbal gaffe / inappropriate remark
entries.notes: 失 (N3.13) + 言 (N5.14). 失言する = to make a gaffe. 政治家の失言 = a politician's gaffe. 失言を取り消す = to retract an inappropriate remark.
連 (N3.2) + 敗 (N3.13). 連敗する = to lose consecutively. 五連敗 = five consecutive losses. Antonym: 連勝 (れんしょう — 勝 N3.12).
害 (N3.13). 害になる = to be harmful. 害がある = there is harm. 害を与える = to cause harm (与 N3.75). Standalone noun; also used as a suffix in compounds.

entries.meaning: defeat (in battle or war) / lost game
entries.notes: 敗 (N3.13) + 戦 (N3.10). 敗戦国 = defeated nation (国 N4). Antonym: 勝戦 (rare — 勝利 is more common).
大 (N5.12) + 失 (N3.13) + 敗 (N3.13). 大失敗する = to fail spectacularly. テストで大失敗した = I bombed the test. 大～ prefix intensifies.
On: ゆう in 自由(じゆう, freedom — 自 N4), 理由(りゆう, reason — 理 N4), ゆ in 経由(けいゆ, via — 経 N3.73), ゆい in 由緒(ゆいしょ, origin/history). Kun: よし (reason, literary). 由来(ゆらい, origin — 来 N5).

Kun: こめ (uncooked rice — 米). On: べい in 米国(べいこく, USA — 国 N4), 欧米(おうべい, Europe and America — 欧 not taught). まい in 新米(しんまい, new rice / rookie — 新 N4), 玄米(げんまい, brown rice — 玄 not taught). Also unit: 米メートル (meter — from French).
Kun: さけ (alcohol generally — お酒), さか in 酒屋(さかや, liquor store — 屋 N4). On: しゅ in 日本酒(にほんしゅ, Japanese sake — 日本 N5), 居酒屋(いざかや, pub — 居 N3.65). 酒を飲む = to drink alcohol.
On: はい in 乾杯(かんぱい, cheers — 乾 not taught, write as かんぱい), 一杯(いっぱい, one cup / full). Counter suffix for drinks: 三杯(さんばい, three cupfuls). Kun: さかずき (sake cup, ceremonial).
自 (N4.4) + 由 (N3.14). 自由な国 = a free country. 自由に = freely. 言論の自由 = freedom of speech. Also noun.
理 (N4.5) + 由 (N3.14). 理由がある = to have a reason. 〜の理由で = for the reason of ~. 理由を説明する = to explain the reason (説明 N4).
由 (N3.14) + 来 (N5.7). 名前の由来 = origin of a name. 〜に由来する = to derive from ~.
米 (N3.14). 米を炊く = to cook rice (炊 not taught). Distinct from ご飯 (cooked rice, v_gohan N5). Japanese staple food.
お (honorific) + 米 (N3.14). More polite/everyday than 米 alone. お米を買う = to buy rice.
米 (N3.14) + 国 (N4.13). Formal/news register for USA. Colloquial: アメリカ. 米国大統領 = US president (大統領 not taught — 統 not in curriculum).
新 (N4.31) + 米 (N3.14). Literal: freshly harvested rice. Figurative: a beginner/rookie (新米の社員 = rookie employee, 社員 N4).
酒 (N3.14). General term for alcoholic drinks (not just sake). 酒を飲む = to drink alcohol. 酒に強い = able to hold one's liquor (強 N4).
お (honorific) + 酒 (N3.14). Common polite form in conversation. お酒が好きです = I like alcohol.
日 (N5.2) + 本 (N5.4) + 酒 (N3.14). Specifically refers to traditional Japanese rice wine, distinct from generic 酒.
酒 (N3.14) + 屋 (N4.9). Uses the さか reading of 酒. 居酒屋(いざかや, pub — 居 N3.65) is a different compound.
乾 (not taught) + 杯 (N3.14). Write as かんぱい (full kana — untaught kanji comes first). Used as an exclamation when clinking glasses. 乾杯する = to make a toast.
一 (N5.3) + 杯 (N3.14). Literal: one cupful. Figurative: full, a lot (おなか一杯 = stomach full; 人が一杯 = lots of people). Often used as adverb.
Grammar nominal used in G36 (expectation). 〜はずだ = should/ought to (based on reasoning). 来るはずだ = should come. Rarely written in kanji (筈).
Grammar nominal used in G36 (わけだ = it makes sense that / so that's why). 〜というわけだ = that's the reason. Kanji form 訳 is not in the curriculum — always written in kana.

Kun: たえる (to cease, die out — 絶える, ichidan), たやす (to exterminate, trans). On: ぜつ in 絶対(ぜったい, absolute — 対 N3.57, matches[] until then), 絶望(ぜつぼう, despair — 望 N3.33), 断絶(だんぜつ, severance — 断 N3.29), 絶食(ぜっしょく, fasting — 食 N5).
Kun: ふね (ship — 船), ふな in 船出(ふなで, setting sail — 出 N5). On: せん in 風船(ふうせん, balloon — 風 N4), 船長(せんちょう, ship captain — 長 N4), 漁船(ぎょせん, fishing boat — 漁 not taught).

Kun: よい/いい (good — v_yoi/v_ii already introduced at N5.1 using this kanji form). On: りょう in 良心(りょうしん, conscience — 心 N4), 良好(りょうこう, good/favorable — 好 N4), 不良(ふりょう, delinquent/bad — 不 N4), 改良(かいりょう, improvement — 改 not taught). 良く(よく)/良かった inflect regularly.

Kun: やぶる (to tear, break — 破る, godan, transitive), やぶれる (to be torn — 破れる, ichidan, intransitive — distinct from 敗れる 'be defeated' 敗 N3.13). On: は in 破産(はさん, bankruptcy — 産 N4.36), 破壊(はかい, destruction — 壊 not taught), 突破(とっぱ, breakthrough — 突 N3.18).
絶 (N3.15) + 対 (N3.57). Write as ぜったい until N3.57. 絶対に = absolutely / without fail. 絶対無理 = absolutely impossible (無 N3.57). Extremely common emphatic adverb.

entries.meaning: to cease / to die out / to be interrupted
entries.notes: 絶 (N3.15). Intransitive. 連絡が絶える = contact is lost (連絡 N3.2). 絶え間なく = without ceasing (間 N5). Literary/formal register.
船 (N3.15). 船に乗る = to board a ship (乗 N4.2). Generic term for watercraft of various sizes.
風 (N4.8) + 船 (N3.15). Party/celebration item. 風船を膨らます = to inflate a balloon (膨 not taught).
良 (N3.15) + 心 (N4.7). 良心がある = to have a conscience. 良心的 = conscientious (的 N3.84). Not to be confused with 両親(りょうしん, parents — 両 N3.26).
良 (N3.15) + 好 (N4.4). 良好な関係 = good relationship (関係 N3.74). Formal register; often used in reports and evaluations.
不 (N4.30) + 良 (N3.15). 不良品 = defective product (品 N4). 不良少年 = juvenile delinquent (少年 N4). Also noun for a delinquent person.

entries.meaning: to tear / to break / to violate (a promise, rule)
entries.notes: 破 (N3.15). Transitive. 紙を破る = to tear paper. 約束を破る = to break a promise (約束 N3.5). 記録を破る = to break a record (記録 N3.51). Antonym of 守る (N3.11).

entries.meaning: to be torn / to be broken / to wear out
entries.notes: 破 (N3.15). Intransitive pair of 破る. Distinct from 敗れる (to be defeated, 敗 N3.13) — same reading, different kanji. 紙が破れた = the paper got torn.
破 (N3.15) + 産 (N4.36). 破産する = to go bankrupt. 会社が破産する = a company goes bankrupt (会社 N4).
突 (N3.18) + 破 (N3.15). 突破する = to break through. 目標を突破する = to surpass a goal. Placed at N3.18 (later kanji) since 突 taught there.

On: き in 期間(きかん, period), 期待(きたい, expectation — 待 N5), 学期(がっき, school term — 学 N5), 期限(きげん, deadline — 限 N3.8), 時期(じき, time/season — 時 N5). ご in 最期(さいご, last moments — 最 N3.16). Typically written in on-reading compounds.
Kun: さらに (furthermore — 更に), ふかす (to stay up late — 更かす). On: こう in 変更(へんこう, change — 変 N3.35), 更新(こうしん, renewal — 新 N4), 更衣室(こういしつ, dressing room — 衣 not taught). 夜更かし(よふかし, staying up late — 夜 N4).

Kun: もっとも (most — 最も). On: さい forms superlatives: 最初(さいしょ, first — 初 N3.3), 最後(さいご, last — 後 N5), 最近(さいきん, recently — 近 N4), 最大(さいだい, largest — 大 N5), 最高(さいこう, highest/best — 高 N5), 最低(さいてい, lowest — 低 N4).

On: み as negating prefix: 未来(みらい, future — 来 N5), 未定(みてい, undecided — 定 N3.29), 未完(みかん, unfinished — 完 N3.17), 未満(みまん, less than — 満 N3.70), 未知(みち, unknown — 知 N4). 未だ(いまだ, still — irregular reading). Formal register.
期 (N3.16) + 間 (N5.9). 期間限定 = limited time only (限 N3.8, 定 N3.29). 〜の期間中 = during the period of ~ (中 N5).
期 (N3.16) + 待 (N5.10). 期待する = to expect / look forward to. 期待に応える = to meet expectations (応 not taught). Distinct from 予想 (prediction, より factual).
学 (N5.6) + 期 (N3.16). 一学期 = first semester. 学期末 = end of semester (末 N3.4).
期 (N3.16) + 限 (N3.8). 期限を守る = to meet a deadline (守 N3.11). 賞味期限 = best-before date (賞 not taught, 味 N4).

entries.meaning: furthermore / moreover / still more / even more
entries.notes: 更 (N3.16). Adverbial. 更に悪くなる = to get even worse. 更に言えば = furthermore. Formal/written; casual often uses もっと.
変 (N3.35) + 更 (N3.16). Write as へん更 until N3.35. 変更する = to change/modify. 予定の変更 = change of plans (予定 N3.29). lesson_ids at N3.35 — full kanji form writable there.

entries.meaning: renewal / update / record (as in breaking it)
entries.notes: 更 (N3.16) + 新 (N4.31). 更新する = to renew / update. 記録を更新する = to break a record (記録 N3.51). パスワードを更新 = update password.

entries.meaning: staying up late / keeping late hours
entries.notes: 夜 (N4.3) + 更 (N3.16). 夜更かしする = to stay up late. Common in daily conversation about sleep habits.
最 (N3.16). Formal form of 一番(いちばん). 最も重要 = most important (重要 N3.8). Written register; casual speech prefers 一番.
最 (N3.16) + 初 (N3.3). 最初に = first / at the beginning. 最初から = from the start. Antonym: 最後.
最 (N3.16) + 近 (N4.9). 最近どう? = How've you been recently? Extremely common time expression. Also adjectival: 最近のニュース = recent news.
最 (N3.16) + 大 (N5.12). 最大の問題 = the biggest problem (問題 N4). Antonym: 最小.
最 (N3.16) + 小 (N5.12). 最小限 = minimum limit (限 N3.8). Antonym: 最大.
最 (N3.16) + 後 (N5.6). 最後に = lastly / finally. 最後まで = until the end. Antonym: 最初.
最 (N3.16) + 高 (N5.12). 最高だ! = It's the best! 最高気温 = highest temperature. Very common enthusiastic expression. Antonym: 最低.
最 (N3.16) + 低 (N4.23). 最低だ! = That's the worst! 最低賃金 = minimum wage (賃 not taught). Used for both literal minimum and moral disapproval.
未 (N3.16) + 来 (N5.7). 未来の自分 = one's future self. Antonym: 過去 (かこ — 過 N3.37, 去 not taught). Distinct from 将来 (しょうらい — 将 not taught; near future).
未 (N3.16). Irregular reading. 未だに = even now / still (emphatic). Formal/written register; casual uses まだ (usually kana).
未 (N3.16) + 知 (N4.28). 未知の世界 = unknown world (世界 N4). Not to be confused with 道(みち, road, N4). Also noun.

Kun: くわえる (to add — 加える, transitive), くわわる (to join, intrans — 加わる). On: か in 参加(さんか, participation — 参 N3.10), 加入(かにゅう, joining — 入 N5), 追加(ついか, addition — 追 N3.27), 加減(かげん, degree/adjustment — 減 not taught).

Kun: たすける (to help, trans — 助ける, ichidan), たすかる (to be saved, intrans — 助かる, godan), すけ in 助っ人(すけっと, helper). On: じょ in 助手(じょしゅ, assistant — 手 N5), 救助(きゅうじょ, rescue — 救 not taught), 援助(えんじょ, aid — 援 not taught).

Kun: そなえる (to prepare / provide — 備える), そなわる (to be equipped with — 備わる). On: び in 準備(じゅんび, preparation — 準 not taught, write as じゅん備), 設備(せつび, equipment — 設 not taught), 予備(よび, spare/reserve — 予 N3.29), 完備(かんび, full equipment — 完 N3.17).
On-reading only. 完全(かんぜん, complete/perfect — 全 N3.7), 完成(かんせい, completion — 成 N3.12), 完了(かんりょう, completion — 了 not taught), 未完(みかん, unfinished — 未 N3.16), 完璧(かんぺき, perfect — 璧 not taught).

entries.meaning: to add / to include / to inflict
entries.notes: 加 (N3.17). Transitive. 砂糖を加える = to add sugar. 力を加える = to apply force (力 N5). Paired intrans: 加わる.

entries.meaning: to be added / to join / to take part
entries.notes: 加 (N3.17). Intransitive pair of 加える. グループに加わる = to join a group.
参 (N3.10) + 加 (N3.17). 参加する = to participate. 参加者 = participant (者 N4). 会議に参加する = to attend a meeting (会議 N4 / 会 N5).
加 (N3.17) + 入 (N5.6). 加入する = to enroll / subscribe. 保険に加入 = to enroll in insurance (保険 not taught; often just 保健 available). More formal than 参加.

entries.meaning: to help / to rescue / to save
entries.notes: 助 (N3.17). Transitive. 人を助ける = to help a person. 命を助ける = to save a life (命 N3.9). Antonym: 見殺しにする (let die, 見 N5 + 殺 N3.11).

entries.meaning: to be saved / to be rescued / to be a great help
entries.notes: 助 (N3.17). Intransitive pair of 助ける. 助かった! = What a relief! / Saved! 助かります = That would be a help (common in thanks/requests).
助 (N3.17). Noun form of 助ける. 助けを求める = to ask for help (求 N3.25). 助けが必要 = need help (必要 N3.8).
助 (N3.17) + 手 (N5.1). 助手席 = passenger seat (席 N3.66). Also the academic rank 'assistant'.

entries.meaning: to prepare / to provide / to equip
entries.notes: 備 (N3.17). 地震に備える = to prepare for an earthquake (地震 N4.33). Also 供える (offer to ancestors, 供 N3.75) — same reading, different meaning.
準 (not in curriculum) + 備 (N3.17). Write as じゅん備 (hybrid reinforces 備). 準備する = to prepare. 準備ができる = to be ready. Extremely common daily verb.
予 (N3.29) + 備 (N3.17). Write as よ備 until N3.29. 予備校 = prep school (校 N4). 予備の電池 = spare battery (電池 N4).
完 (N3.17) + 全 (N3.7). 完全に = completely / totally. 完全な = complete/perfect. Stronger than 全部 (all, of a set).
完 (N3.17) + 成 (N3.12). 完成する = to complete / be completed. プロジェクトの完成 = project completion. More formal than 出来上がる.
未 (N3.16) + 完 (N3.17). 未完の作品 = unfinished work (作品 N4). Not to be confused with the fruit みかん (tangerine, kana).
完 (N3.17) + 備 (N3.17). エアコン完備 = air conditioning fully equipped. Common in apartment/hotel listings.

On: じつ in 実は(じつは, actually — v_jitsuwa N4/G21), 事実(じじつ, fact — 事 N4), 実力(じつりょく, real ability — 力 N5), 実験(じっけん, experiment — 験 N4.10), 実家(じっか, parents' home — 家 N5), 実行(じっこう, execution — 行 N5), 実際(じっさい, actually — 際 N3.85). Kun: み (fruit), みのる (to bear fruit — 実る).

On: そん in 存在(そんざい, existence — 在 N3.18), 存続(そんぞく, continuation — 続 N3.4), 共存(きょうぞん, coexistence — 共 N3.75). ぞん in 存じる(ぞんじる, humble 'know'), ご存じ (honorific 'know'), 保存(ほぞん, preservation — 保 not taught).

Kun: ある (to exist — 在る, mostly written kana, v_aru in N5). On: ざい in 存在(そんざい, existence — 存 N3.18), 現在(げんざい, present time — 現 N3.35), 在学(ざいがく, enrolled — 学 N5), 不在(ふざい, absent — 不 N4), 滞在(たいざい, stay — 滞 not taught).

Kun: つく (to thrust/poke — 突く). On: とつ in 突然(とつぜん, suddenly — 然 N3.84, matches[] until then), 突破(とっぱ, breakthrough — 破 N3.15, see v_toppa at N3.18), 衝突(しょうとつ, collision — 衝 not taught), 激突(げきとつ, crash — 激 not taught).

entries.meaning: real ability / true strength / actual power
entries.notes: 実 (N3.18) + 力 (N5.16). 実力がある = to have real ability. 実力主義 = meritocracy (主義 not taught — 義). Common in work/sports contexts.
事 (N4.23) + 実 (N3.18). 事実上 = in fact / effectively (上 N5). Contrast with 真実 (truth — 真 not taught).
実 (N3.18) + 験 (N4.10). 実験する = to experiment. 科学実験 = science experiment (科 N3.72). Also metaphorical: 社会実験 = social experiment.

entries.meaning: execution / carrying out / putting into practice
entries.notes: 実 (N3.18) + 行 (N5.6). 実行する = to carry out / execute. 計画を実行する = to execute a plan (計画 N4).
実 (N3.18) + 家 (N5.8). 実家に帰る = to go back to one's parents' home (帰 N4.1). Distinct from 自宅 (own home, 自 N4 + 宅 N3.65).

entries.meaning: to bear fruit / to ripen / to bear results
entries.notes: 実 (N3.18). Literal: fruit/crops ripen. Figurative: efforts pay off (努力が実る = efforts bear fruit, 努力 N3.12).
存 (N3.18) + 在 (N3.18). 存在する = to exist. 神の存在 = the existence of God (神 N3.43). Intra-lesson compound.
存 (N3.18). Humble form of 知る/思う. ご存じですか = Do you know? (honorific). 存じております = I know (humble). Keigo register.

entries.meaning: enrolled / being a student / attending school
entries.notes: 在 (N3.18) + 学 (N5.6). 在学中 = during one's enrollment (中 N5). 在学証明書 = certificate of enrollment.

entries.meaning: absence / not present / not at home
entries.notes: 不 (N4.30) + 在 (N3.18). 不在通知 = absence notice (通知 N4/知 N4.28). Formal register — daily speech prefers 留守(るす, N3.58).

entries.meaning: to thrust / to poke / to pierce
entries.notes: 突 (N3.18). 針で突く = to prick with a needle. Distinct from v_tsuku (着く, to arrive, N4.1) — same reading, different kanji and meaning.
突 (N3.18) + 然 (N3.84). Write as とつぜん until N3.84. 突然の出来事 = sudden event. Extremely common adverb. Also na-adj: 突然な変化.

entries.meaning: point in time / situation / just about to (nominal / aspectual)
entries.notes: Grammar nominal used in G37 (aspect). 〜するところだ = about to do ~. 〜しているところだ = in the middle of doing ~. 〜したところだ = just finished doing ~. Distinct from v_tokoro (所, place, N4.9) — written kana for the aspectual sense.

Kun: たとえる (to compare — 例える, ichidan), たとえば (for example — 例えば, common adverb). On: れい in 例(a standalone example), 例外(れいがい, exception — 外 N4), 例文(れいぶん, example sentence — 文 N5), 事例(じれい, case/instance — 事 N4), 用例(ようれい, usage example — 用 N5).
On: こう in 天候(てんこう, weather — 天 N4), 気候(きこう, climate — 気 N5), 候補(こうほ, candidate — 補 not taught), 兆候(ちょうこう, sign/indication — 兆 not taught). Kun: そうろう (classical verb ending, extinct in modern speech).

entries.meaning: case / matter / affair / counter for items
entries.notes: On-reading only. 事件(じけん, incident — 事 N4), 条件(じょうけん, condition — 条 not taught), 用件(ようけん, business matter — 用 N5), 案件(あんけん, issue/case — 案 not taught). Counter: 一件(いっけん, one case).

Kun: よる (to be due to — 因る, mostly written in kana as よる). On: いん in 原因(げんいん, cause — 原 N3.84, matches[] until then), 因果(いんが, cause and effect — 果 N3.84), 要因(よういん, main factor — 要 N3.8), 因みに(ちなみに, by the way — usually kana).
例 (N3.19). Extremely common discourse marker. 例えば〜のような = like, for example ~. Essential for giving examples in both speech and writing.

entries.meaning: to compare / to liken / to use as a metaphor
entries.notes: 例 (N3.19). AをBに例える = to compare A to B. 例えて言えば = so to speak / figuratively. Often passes as kana たとえる.
例 (N3.19). 例を挙げる = to give an example (挙 not taught). 例のごとく = as usual. Also meaning 'the usual' (例の店 = the usual restaurant).
例 (N3.19) + 外 (N4.21). 例外なく = without exception. 例外的 = exceptional (的 N3.84). ルールの例外 = exception to the rule.
例 (N3.19) + 文 (N5.15). Essential for language learning. 例文を見る = to look at example sentences.
天 (N4.8) + 候 (N3.19). More formal than 天気 (N5). 悪天候 = bad weather. Common in news/weather reports.
気 (N5.13) + 候 (N3.19). Distinct from 天気 (day-to-day weather) and 天候 (weather conditions). 気候変動 = climate change (変動 — 変 N3.35, 動 N4).
事 (N4.23) + 件 (N3.19). 事件が起きる = an incident occurs (起 N4.1). Often used for crimes or notable happenings. 殺人事件 = murder case (殺人 N3.11).
用 (N5.15) + 件 (N3.19). ご用件は? = What's your business? / How may I help? Common in phone and customer service contexts.
原 (N3.84) + 因 (N3.19). Write as げんいん (full kana) or 原いん (partial) until N3.84. 原因と結果 = cause and effect (結果 N3.84). Extremely common in explanations and analyses.
因 (N3.19) + 果 (N3.84). Write as 因が until N3.84 (but rare compound — typically full kana いんが). 因果関係 = causal relationship (関係 N3.74). Buddhist concept of karma.
要 (N3.8) + 因 (N3.19). 主な要因 = main factor. More formal/analytical than 原因.
Kanji form 因みに uses 因 (N3.19) but the word is almost always written in kana. Discourse marker for adding related information.

entries.meaning: deal with / place / handle / dispose of
entries.notes: On: しょ in 処理(しょり, processing — 理 N4), 処分(しょぶん, disposal — 分 N5), 処置(しょち, treatment/measure — 置 N3.20), 対処(たいしょ, dealing with — 対 N3.57, matches[]). Kun: ところ (place — rarely written in this kanji in modern use; ところ more commonly kana or 所).

Kun: おく (to put, place — 置く; v_oku in N4.14 now also tags 置く via matches[]). On: ち in 位置(いち, position — 位 N3.81), 設置(せっち, installation — 設 not taught), 放置(ほうち, leaving alone — 放 N3.48), 装置(そうち, device — 装 not taught), 処置(しょち, treatment — 処 N3.20).

Kun: つむ (to pile up, load — 積む, transitive), つもる (to accumulate, intrans — 積もる). On: せき in 面積(めんせき, area — 面 N3.59), 体積(たいせき, volume — 体 N4), 積極的(せっきょくてき, proactive — 極 not taught + 的 N3.84), 蓄積(ちくせき, accumulation — 蓄 not taught).

Kun: なおす (to fix — 直す, transitive), なおる (to be fixed, intrans — 直る), ただちに (immediately — 直ちに). On: ちょく in 直接(ちょくせつ, directly — 接 not taught), 直前(ちょくぜん, just before — 前 N5), 直後(ちょくご, just after — 後 N5), 正直(しょうじき, honest — 正 N4). じき in 直ぐ(すぐ, immediately, usually kana).
処 (N3.20) + 理 (N4.5). 処理する = to process / handle. データ処理 = data processing. ゴミの処理 = garbage disposal.
処 (N3.20) + 分 (N5.3). 処分する = to dispose of / punish. ゴミを処分 = to dispose of trash. 懲戒処分 = disciplinary action (懲戒 not taught).
処 (N3.20) + 置 (N3.20). Intra-lesson compound. 応急処置 = first aid (応急 not taught). 処置を取る = to take action (取 N3.41).

entries.meaning: to put / to place / to leave (an item)
entries.notes: 置 (N3.20). Transitive verb for placing objects. 本を机に置く = to put a book on the desk (机 N4). Related entry v_oku (N4.14, おく) covers the auxiliary 〜ておく and kana form; both are tagged by the text processor for different contexts.
設 (not taught) + 置 (N3.20). Write as せっ置 as 設 is not in curriculum. エアコンを設置する = to install air conditioning. Formal/technical register.
放 (N3.48) + 置 (N3.20). Write as ほう置 until N3.48. 放置する = to leave alone / neglect. 放置自転車 = abandoned bicycle (自転車 N4).

entries.meaning: to pile up / to load / to accumulate (experience)
entries.notes: 積 (N3.20). 荷物を積む = to load luggage (荷物 N4). 経験を積む = to accumulate experience (経験 N3.73). Transitive.

entries.meaning: to accumulate / to pile up (intrans, e.g. snow)
entries.notes: 積 (N3.20). Intransitive pair of 積む. 雪が積もる = snow piles up (雪 N3.68). 埃が積もる = dust accumulates (埃 not taught).
面 (N3.59) + 積 (N3.20). Write as めん積 until N3.59. 土地の面積 = area of land (土地 N4). Math/geography term.

entries.meaning: to fix / to repair / to correct
entries.notes: 直 (N3.20). Transitive. 車を直す = to fix a car. 間違いを直す = to correct a mistake (間違い N3.2 via 違). Distinct from 治す (to heal — 治 N3.86).

entries.meaning: to be fixed / to be repaired / to be corrected
entries.notes: 直 (N3.20). Intransitive pair of 直す. 車が直る = the car gets fixed. Distinct from 治る (to heal — 治 N3.86).
直 (N3.20) + 接 (not taught). Write as 直せつ as 接 is not in curriculum. 直接話す = to talk directly / in person. Antonym: 間接 (indirect — 間 N5, 接 not taught).
直 (N3.20) + 前 (N5.6). 試験の直前 = right before the exam (試験 N4). Antonym: 直後.
直 (N3.20) + 後 (N5.6). 事故の直後 = right after the accident (事故 N4). Antonym: 直前.
正 (N4.7) + 直 (N3.20). 正直な人 = an honest person. 正直に言うと = to be honest. Common discourse marker.
